impressum.metaDescription: Imprint pursuant to §5 TMG (German Telemedia Act) for iamguer.com.
impressum.heading: Imprint
impressum.mstvHeading: Responsible for content pursuant to §18 Abs. 2 MStV
impressum.haftungInhalteP1: As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages under the general laws pursuant to §7 Abs. 1 TMG. However, pursuant to §§ 8 to 10 TMG, we as a service provider are not obliged to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or to investigate circumstances that indicate unlawful activity.
impressum.haftungInhalteP2: Obligations to remove or block the use of information under the general laws remain unaffected by this. Liability in this regard is, however, only possible from the point at which we become aware of a specific infringement. As soon as we become aware of any such infringements, we will remove the relevant content immediately.
impressum.haftungLinksP1: Our site contains links to external third-party websites whose content we have no influence over. For this reason, we cannot accept any liability for this third-party content. The respective provider or operator of the linked pages is always responsible for their content. The linked pages were checked for possible legal infringements at the time of linking. No unlawful content was apparent at the time of linking.
impressum.haftungLinksP2: However, ongoing monitoring of the content of linked pages is not reasonable without specific indications of an infringement. Should we become aware of any infringements, we will remove such links immediately.
impressum.urheberrechtP1: All photographs published on this website are protected by copyright. Reproduction, distribution or use of the images — including in extracts — is permitted only with the express written consent of the author.
impressum.euOdrP1: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR):

datenschutz.metaDescription: Privacy policy for iamguer.com under the DSGVO (Germany's GDPR implementation).
datenschutz.heading: Privacy
datenschutz.verantwortlicherP1Before: The controller within the meaning of the General Data Protection Regulation is the operator of this website. You will find the full contact details in the
datenschutz.hostingP1: This website is hosted by Vercel Inc. (440 N Barranca Ave #4133, Covina, CA 91723, USA). The server location for this site is Frankfurt am Main, Germany. When the website is accessed, Vercel automatically processes data such as IP address, browser type, and the date and time of the request. This data is used solely for the stable operation of the website and is not used for tracking purposes.
datenschutz.cookiesP1: This website does not use cookies and does not employ any tracking technologies. No analysis of user behaviour takes place.
datenschutz.audioStorageP1: We use your browser's session storage to remember your audio preference (with music / muted) during your visit. This data is stored only on your device, never transmitted to us, and automatically deleted when you close your browser tab.
datenschutz.audioStorageP2: Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interest in functional website operation) and § 25(2)(2) TDDDG (technically necessary).
datenschutz.instagramP1: This website embeds content from Instagram (Meta Platforms Ireland Limited, 4 Grand Canal Square, Dublin 2, Ireland). The images are fetched at build time via the official Instagram Graph API and delivered as static content. No data is transmitted to Meta during normal use of the website. Only when you click an Instagram link do you leave this site and get redirected to instagram.com.
datenschutz.domainP1: The domain iamguer.com is managed via United Domains AG (Gautinger Str. 10, 82319 Starnberg). The domain is technically required for the site to be reached; no personal data is stored at the domain provider.
datenschutz.logsP1: When the website is accessed, the hosting provider (Vercel) automatically collects technical data:
logsItems: Date and time of the request
datenschutz.logsP2: This data serves the technical security and stable delivery of the website. It is not analysed for any other purpose, nor is it merged with other data sources. Legal basis: Art. 6 Abs. 1 lit. f DSGVO (legitimate interest in stable operation).
datenschutz.kontaktP1Before: If you contact us by email at
datenschutz.kontaktP1After: , your data will be processed in order to respond to your enquiry. The data will not be passed on to third parties and will be deleted once your enquiry has been dealt with, unless statutory retention periods apply.
datenschutz.kontaktP2: Legal basis: Art. 6 Abs. 1 lit. b DSGVO (initiation/performance of a contract) or lit. f (legitimate interest).
datenschutz.rechteP1: Under the General Data Protection Regulation, you have the following rights:
rechteItems: Right to restriction of processing (Art. 18 DSGVO)
Right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority
datenschutz.rechteP2Before: To exercise your rights or for any questions about data protection, please contact
datenschutz.rechteP3: You have the right to lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority. For Hessen, this is the Hessischer Beauftragter für Datenschutz und Informationsfreiheit:
datenschutz.aktualitaetP2: We update this privacy policy when material changes occur. The current version can always be found on this page.
